message:
Minor cleanups from fresh-eyes code review

- process-transcript.ts: Fix type guard to accurately reflect that name/input
  are optional in tool_use blocks (the runtime code already handled this
  safely via optional chaining)

- Providers.tsx: Remove unused variant="minimal" prop from ErrorBoundary
  that wraps SpotlightSearch (ignored when custom fallback is provided)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
